privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic "Commercial Construction" Microsoft Project template loaded into ProjectLibre at /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml. The agent must create a new milestone named "Foundation Work Complete" (duration 0 or Milestone flag 1). This milestone must be positioned immediately after the existing task "Strip column piers and foundation forms", which corresponds to task UID 44 in the underlying XML structure.
